title: Identify basic automotive faults using troubleshooting processes
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify basic automotive faults using troubleshooting processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Confirm nature of fault or problem

pcs.text: Nature of customer enquiry or concern is determined using appropriate questioning techniques1.2 Hazards associated with fault identification process are recognised and precautions are taken according to safety requirements1.3 Troubleshooting process options are researched and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability according to manufacturer procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Nature of customer enquiry or concern is determined using appropriate questioning techniques1.2 Hazards associated with fault identification process are recognised and precautions are taken according to safety requirements1.3 Troubleshooting process options are researched and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability according to manufacturer procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Nature of customer enquiry or concern is determined using appropriate questioning techniques1.2 Hazards associated with fault identification process are recognised and precautions are taken according to safety requirements1.3 Troubleshooting process options are researched and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability according to manufacturer procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Confirm nature of fault or problem

elements.title: Identify and report on fault

pcs.text: Automotive system or component relating to fault or problem is identified2.2 Troubleshooting processes that identify likely cause of fault or problem are followed according to workplace procedures and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Information and support to assist in the fault identification process are sought as required2.4 Report is forwarded to appropriate persons for action according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Automotive system or component relating to fault or problem is identified2.2 Troubleshooting processes that identify likely cause of fault or problem are followed according to workplace procedures and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Information and support to assist in the fault identification process are sought as required2.4 Report is forwarded to appropriate persons for action according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Automotive system or component relating to fault or problem is identified2.2 Troubleshooting processes that identify likely cause of fault or problem are followed according to workplace procedures and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Information and support to assist in the fault identification process are sought as required2.4 Report is forwarded to appropriate persons for action according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and report on fault

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle or equipment is presented ready for use3.2 Tools and equipment are checked and stored, and faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and according to workplace procedures3.3 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle or equipment is presented ready for use3.2 Tools and equipment are checked and stored, and faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and according to workplace procedures3.3 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle or equipment is presented ready for use3.2 Tools and equipment are checked and stored, and faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and according to workplace procedures3.3 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
